untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'slow moving average' and 'fast moving average' without specifying period lengths or type (SMA/EMA). Parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Approximation uses sma_50 (slow) and sma_20 (fast) as reasonable defaults for a Kaufman-style mean reversion strategy, but exact parameters are unknown.
translation_notes: Interpreted 'slow moving average is up' as slow MA > slower MA (uptrend context). Interpreted 'fast moving average turns down' as fast MA crossing below slow MA (reversal signal). Exit conditions reversed per reversal logic. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal spec. Target regime limited to TRENDING per signal intent.
